claim_text: Lovable Launched was introduced as a public surface where builders could submit apps for discovery and voting.
Lovable quick-start docs say users can remix projects with public remixing enabled, their own projects, or projects they can access.
Lovable project access docs say public remixing lets someone copy the latest version without editing the original, and that viewers can see source code when remixing is enabled.

Lovable's April 2026 incident post says public project chat history and source code were no longer accessible to other users and that public projects were being moved private except for official remixable templates.
GitLab TeamOps shared reality describes public-by-default knowledge sharing and a bias toward transparency across business functions.

GitLab communication guidance describes handbook pages as part of the handbook and the handbook as the central repository for how the company runs.
